Directions Visit Website More Details EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides customized employment and training activities. The goal is to prepare as many clients as possible for unsubsidized employment with employers identified through job development activities. 821 Main Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but some programs have specialized target populations, such as public assistance recipients, public housing residents, and individuals involved with the County Corrections Department Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 655-8840 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides job training, individualized career and life coaching, personal finance and life skills education, job placement, and work experience opportunities. Works with the Workforce Innovation and Opportunity Act (WIOA) program. Also provides job placement and support for ex-offenders in addition to a welfare to work program. 1930 S 6th Street Klamath Falls, OR 976013370 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 887-8495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION REENTRY SERVICES EX-OFFENDER RESOURCE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A resource center supporting individuals transitioning from incarceration, those on probation or parole, and others affected by the criminal justice system. Offers weekly legal clinics for civil matters, help with health insurance applications, and classes on parenting, personal finance, tenant readiness, and motivation. Provides consultations, information, and referrals for people and families impacted by incarceration. A computer lab is available for tutoring, GED preparation, job searches, and other needs. 2085 Commercial Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Current or past involvement with criminal justice system. Preference given to those currently on parole supervision and recently released from incarceration. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (971) 332-5332 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OPPORTUNITY OREGON JOB CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive employment services such as resume and cover letter support, interview practice, networking and referrals to potential employers, and job placement. Individual and peer mentoring groups and navigation of community resources is available on a case by case, limited basis. Services available virtually or in-person. 1045 Gateway Loop Suite C Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Individuals who are currently or were formerly incarcerated Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Email Directions Visit Website More Details SPONSORS INC ROSS SHEPARD REENTRY RESOURCE CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides employment, housing and resource support to individuals with conviction histories. Services include job counseling, interview preparation support, and educational workshops on resume writing, saving and budgeting, and job/housing search strategies. Also provides assistance preparing educational and financial aid applications, housing packets/applications, and other supports to help individuals with conviction histories overcome barriers to employment and housing access. 338 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Individuals with conviction histories Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 505-5682 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE DPI GROUP EMPLOYMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary and full-time employment opportunities for individuals facing employment barriers. 4950 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Age 18 and older People with disabilities, veterans, those experiencing homelessness, and those with justice system involvement Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (503) 281-1289 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT ALL STAR LABOR & STAFFING TEMPORARY AND PERMANENT STAFFING AND JOB PLACEMENT EARLY LEARNING HUB OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY CHILDREN FAMILY & COMMUNITY CONNECTIONS FOR CLACKAMAS COUNTY KLAMATH WORKS JOB CONNECTION MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY EX-OFFENDER RESOURCE PROGRAM OPPORTUNITY OREGON JOB CONNECTION SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM SOUTHERN OREGON GOODWILL JOB CONNECTION PROGRAM SPONSORS INC ROSS SHEPARD REENTRY RESOURCE CENTER THE DPI GROUP EMPLOYMENT SERVICES
